problem: Raw applicant PII (names/DOB/doc numbers/addresses) stored cleartext in prod DB
root_cause: OCR audit writer serializes full brain field values (source_value/final_value/input_raw); the sibling manual_review_events PII rule was never applied to this writer; no TTL/retention
evidence: 575 of 668 live rows contain per-field PII jsonb; no cron deletes it; DATABASE_INVENTORY.csv + INFRA_OPERATIONS_AUDIT.md
recommended_action: Redact/hash brain_raw at write; add TTL+cron purge; backfill-scrub existing rows; treat as PII table per project rule

problem: No environment isolation: Preview/Dev deployments read AND write the production Supabase with the production service-role key
root_cause: Single Supabase project; SUPABASE_URL + SERVICE_ROLE_KEY set identically for Production/Preview/Development in Vercel
evidence: list_projects=1 project rtfxrlountkoegsseukx; vercel env ls shows shared scope; INFRA_OPERATIONS_AUDIT.md
recommended_action: Provision dedicated staging Supabase + Stripe-test; scope service-role key to production only; block preview writes to prod

problem: Re-Parole packet generation has NO server-side payment verification (free $15 packet)
root_cause: Re-Parole cloned from TPS flow but the x-payment-token server gate was not carried over; paid set client-side via ?paid=1
evidence: full guard grep zero matches; TPS gate at generate route:109-119 by contrast; USER_FLOW_MATRIX.md §2
recommended_action: Add x-payment-token verification vs Stripe to reparole/generate-packet, mirroring TPS; reject direct POST/?paid=1

problem: Server PII ledger NOT_WIRED to any live flow despite 'wired/done/E2E' claims
root_cause: #132 tested route in isolation; #133 wired client adapter into orphaned GeneratePacketBlock.tsx (0 importers); live TPSWizardV2 left untouched; no browser smoke
evidence: GET /api/wizard-draft=404; wizard_drafts 0 rows; grep 0 importers of GeneratePacketBlock; SECURITY_PII_AUDIT.md §1
recommended_action: Wire ledger into live TPSWizardV2 behind flag; add live-wizard test + browser smoke asserting no localStorage PII when ON; then reparole/ead/translation

problem: No reviewed real-document corpus or ground truth -> read ACCURACY unmeasured; '0 fabricated' counts EMPTY as success
root_cause: PII firewall (correctly never commit real docs) leaves only synthetic fixtures that carry their own answers; sha256 manifest treated as corpus proof; downstream docs dropped the benchmark's own disclaimers
evidence: corpus source dirs gitignored+absent; benchmark covers 3 docs, critical fields EMPTY; CORPUS_INVENTORY.csv; DOCUMENT_COVERAGE_REALITY.md
recommended_action: Build sanctioned redacted real-doc GT mechanism + independent review; separate coverage from non-fabrication metrics; gate in CI once staging exists

problem: Anti-fabrication gate OFF in prod while Gemini vision (documented wrong-person identity risk) is the reader on MRZ-less docs
root_cause: hardenFinalValues protects only the TEXT brain (DeepSeek); ANTI_FABRICATION_GATE_ENABLED default OFF; booklet/certificates have no MRZ anchor so the review net is thinnest where risk is highest
evidence: BRAIN_DICTIONARY_AUDIT.md B3+root-cause; gemini-2.5 disqualified per-class for wrong-person
recommended_action: Enable anti-fab gate for MRZ-less classes (after GT); keep MRZ-controlling where MRZ exists; force review on non-Latin

problem: Prod DB schema ahead of main by 4 out-of-band V2 migrations whose .sql exist only in frozen PR #119
root_cause: V2 migrations applied directly to prod Supabase to run .live.test invariants from the draft branch; code+migration files never merged to main
exact_files: supabase/migrations (main lacks them); PR #119 diff only
evidence: list_migrations shows 20260614005529/005615/005650/032529 APPLIED; absent from main ls-files; TRANSLATION_V2_AUDIT.md DB DRIFT
recommended_action: Back-port the 4 migration .sql into main so code-of-record matches prod (without merging #119 logic), OR formally merge #119; document widen_canonical_guards impact

problem: Canonical override/correction loop (the only place canonical becomes authoritative) is an orphan route with 0 prod traffic; enforce-flip would be unsafe
root_cause: ADR-017 built a new canonical core + override route but live routes were wired to pre-existing docintel reader; UI uses legacy correct-field/confirm-field instead
evidence: grep api/canonical in app/components=none; canonical_overrides 0 rows; CANONICAL_CORE_AUDIT.md
recommended_action: Do NOT flip enforce until override loop is wired to UI; either wire it or formally mark canonical-core shadow-only and remove dead readDocumentCore

problem: OCR cache + provider budget NOT_WIRED -> prod OCR uncapped, up to 3 paid calls/upload, no dedupe across re-uploads/Stripe retries
root_cause: #127 built cache/budget as injectable side-effect-free library for benchmark unit-testability; wiring deferred to a staging-dependent phase that doesn't exist
exact_files: lib/v1/ocrCache.ts, ocrCacheStore.ts, providerBudget.ts, cachedBudgetedProvider.ts (0 importers); tps/ocr/extract + translation/vision-extract call providers directly
recommended_action: Wire cache+budget chokepoint into readDocument/provider calls behind flag; add per-document idempotency to prevent duplicate charges on retry

problem: PII still browser-persisted in prod (#120 minimizes, does not remove); ledger Phase B inert
root_cause: #120 was an explicit minimization slice; full removal depends on the server ledger which is built but not wired/enabled
recommended_action: Complete ledger wiring (R04) to remove value/raw from browser; until then keep TTL+clear-on-completion (present)

problem: No dedicated staging + no verified Stripe test-vs-live isolation
root_cause: Single project economics; staging deferred; only one STRIPE_SECRET_KEY/WEBHOOK_SECRET in prod env, no *_TEST variant
evidence: both staging workflows exit 0 dry-run (V1_STAGING_READY not true); INFRA_OPERATIONS_AUDIT.md
recommended_action: Stand up staging Supabase + Stripe Test Mode keys; flip V1_STAGING_READY only after isolation proven

problem: Single shared admin secret; no per-operator identity; non-constant-time compare for PDF-send + queue mutations
root_cause: Auth model compares request cookie to one env ADMIN_SECRET; per-operator identity deferred to V2/#119; static audit actor 'translation_operator'
recommended_action: Introduce per-operator identity + rotation + timing-safe compare when V2 operator layer lands

problem: SECURITY DEFINER RPCs is_admin/is_moderator_or_admin executable by 'authenticated' role via REST
root_cause: Pre-existing function grants; not introduced by #121-#133
recommended_action: Confirm intent or REVOKE EXECUTE from authenticated

problem: No enforced branch protection on main (free private GitHub plan); direct push permitted
root_cause: Repo on free plan; CLAUDE.md sanctions direct push; guards.yml advisory only
recommended_action: Make CI required (paid plan or public) so guards block merges; or enforce via process discipline

problem: Backups/PITR/DR and rollback runbook UNVERIFIED
root_cause: Managed-tier dependent, not readable via MCP read-only; no restore/DR/incident runbook in repo
recommended_action: Confirm Supabase PITR tier; author restore + rollback + incident runbooks; test a restore

problem: No cost dashboard / no runtime provider-budget visibility; provider spend uncapped at route
root_cause: budget guard library-only (R09); cost visibility = provider consoles only
recommended_action: Wire budget (R09); add spend telemetry/dashboard

problem: PR #128 '3/3 PDF readback PASS' is an unbacked JSON literal (real proof is #116, synthetic)
root_cause: Label/doc drift: a hand-authored PASS string propagated into STATUS/CHANGELOG as if a gate existed
exact_files: artifacts/v1/.../benchmark.json; STATUS.md; CHANGELOG.md; real tests lib/packet/__tests__/*.e2e + i821/i131/i765 (from #116)
recommended_action: Correct STATUS/CHANGELOG to cite #116 PROVEN_LOCAL; stop labeling JSON writes as gate results

problem: Translation vision-extract runs buildCanonicalResult twice (canonical + legacy), persisting redundant shadow records
root_cause: Parity path kept during migration; never collapsed
recommended_action: Collapse to single canonical persist once parity confidence is established

problem: Dead code: readDocumentCore, central-brain, oneBrain/decideField carried as if live
root_cause: ADR-017 new core never wired; live route used pre-existing docintel reader
evidence: grep zero non-test/non-self importers; CANONICAL_CORE_AUDIT.md Q1
recommended_action: Remove or quarantine dead modules after confirming no enforce-path plan depends on them

problem: STATUS.md/RELEASE_STATE.yaml stale (production_sha=62c897a; live=02eb595); claims ledger WIRED/READY
root_cause: Docs not updated after 5 post-doc PR merges; claim-vs-reality drift
recommended_action: Update STATUS/RELEASE_STATE to live sha and correct ledger status to NOT_WIRED

problem: Cron cleanup schedule for generated_packets/wizard_drafts not verifiable from repo; no wizard_drafts purge cron found
root_cause: Schedule lives in platform/Vercel cron config not readable here; wizard_drafts TTL comment has no backing cron
recommended_action: Add/verify cron that purges expired wizard_drafts and generated_packets; document schedule

problem: Gazetteer is a 24-centre seed (not exhaustive); off-seed places fall through to raw KMU-55 transliteration
root_cause: Seed scope by design; coverage limit
recommended_action: Expand gazetteer as GT reveals gaps; acceptable interim (no fabrication, just coverage)

problem: Key rotation manual; Vision SA key historically pasted in chat; service-role key shared across envs widens blast radius
root_cause: No automated rotation; historical exposure noted in MEMORY
recommended_action: Rotate exposed keys; scope service-role to prod (R02); adopt rotation cadence
